creator: alex@big.endian.de
text:
Also sprach duffner@fh-konstanz.de (duffner@fh-konstanz.de):

> fetchmail (/usr/ports/mail/fetchmail) includes a utility  create
> a configuration set via a GUI.
> This GUI is written in Python and requieres a tk_inter-module that
> is not supplied with Python by default.
> But it lives in the
> /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/py-tkinter-1.5.2 
> >Fix:
> Insert the dependency in the Makefile.

Absolutely not!
It _must not_ be the case that a whole subset of unneeded crap (tcl,
X, python) is needed for a simple _mail tool_.

You can still install python manually if you really want it, though
this is a, err, Warmduscher-Tool (english word not known), since
the fetchmail manpage is very detailed.

Alex
